info.title: Stadium SaaS API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for the Stadium SaaS Backend system. This API handles stadium bookings, management, and tenant operations.

List all fields for a stadium

Get blocked slots for a field

422.description: Cannot delete stadium with upcoming bookings

post.summary: Check field availability and calculate price

get.summary: List all stadiums for a tenant
Get available slots for a specific date
